title: Everbuild Fix & Grout Tile Adhesive 703 500ml
description: Everbuild 703 Fix & Grout Tile Adhesive is a premium grade adhesive, which has been formulated to be used as both an adhesive and grout. The product contains a fungicide to prevent mould growth and dries to a brilliant white finish. Tested to EN 12004 type D2T. BENEFITS: - Excellent water resistance - Extremely high bond strength - over double the B. S. minimum requirement in wet shear (7 days drying, 7 days water immersion followed for slight thermal movement - Dries brilliant white - Contains a fungicide - prevents mould growth - Ready mixed formula - no mixing, no mess. Apply straight from the tub - Easier to apply than most competitive adhesives - Extended open time AREAS FOR USE: - Kitchen/Bathroom walls - Shower areas - Communal and power showers - Work tops subject to water contact 1 x Everbuild 703 Fix & Grout Tile Adhesive 750g Additional Information: • Fix Type: Adhesive & Grout • Size (kg): 0.75
